TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == alutid a pucu' ś∑čŚ∑īÁė§ alutid a pucu' "kamu nu Ing, lymphoma" han, singangan aca alutud gang, han, nu alutid sipaw masumad malaizangay a sipaw pucu'. uyni a ngangan ugang han, caay ku hamin mahiniay a pucu'. hina maazihay nu saayaway imelang caay kaadada tabaki sa ku alutid, mahamin ku uzip, tunaku sulalisan, sitanang, mawada' ku baket nu uzup, "uyni tuluay kasahini pulung han pangangan han B symptoms", hinangelu' anucaay calenget ku banges pihaceng tu kya tahekal, labii ku ka sitanang. pasasizuma ŚąÜť°ě alutid a pucu' u misanga'ay tu izeng nu ulat sakaput a pucu'. duduc tu kasahini nu sipaw, angangan tusa ku kasasizuma, he-cye-cin-se ulata pucu' atu caay ku he-cye-cin-se ulat pucu', zuma pasu i kitat ciki sakaput kasasizuma izaw henay ku dues pucu' atu ulat mulaladay a imelang. . he-cye-cin-se alutid a pucu' izaw ku mahiniay a sipa Reed-Sternberg, caay ka talakaw ku mahiniay a imelang, wawa hehenaw siimelang tu mahiniay hawsa kapah ngaayen. cayay ku he-cye-cin-se alutid a pucu' nayi' ku mahizaay a sipaw, talakaw ku ka imelang, 90% ku kacalap tu hamin nu alutid a pucu', zuma pasu cacanan a kasasizuma, balaki tu ku mihcaan kya imelang, caay tu kakapah ngaayen. alutid a pucu' hakay makay nu luma'ay a imelang, makay mililiday tu nu babalaki a imelang masumad, malalid nu bayduk, yu-men-low-sin-kan-cin a malalid nu cilkay, hu-se, hwa-sye a sapayu atu pakayniay nu uzipay a sapitena' a cumudan. he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' katalawan malalid ku sipaw, pasu EB a bayduk atu zumaay a bayduk. cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' katalawan a ing-ce pasu nu uzipay a imelang, u tademaw caay kataneng ku sapitena' tu bayduk atu ay-ce-pin, tademaw T a alutid sipaw malalid nu bayduk, sipaw muzepit I satabu haymaw sa mabena' yadah ku nikan tu titi atu simal, micukaymas tu pisatezep, atu zuma sapipatay tu cilekay. malibayaw ku alutud u siimela'ay tu alutid a pucu' hinamaazihay ku mahiniay a imelang, anu mulalad ku gang a sipuw tayza i dues maduka ku sapisanga' tu izang hawsa a caay kataneng ku izang, malebawa atu hina malalid nu bayking. uzuma u imelang pasu lalid sa malalisan, sitanang tu labii, macahcah, makudus, calenget ku banges atu malalid mangelu' ku uzip. hina makayzaay i izang, iisi, dues mikinsa amiazih u alutud a gang, kelit hank u lin-pa hakay taneng mipadang tu piazih tu imelang. pigingkiw nu ising tu nisasingan a taneng alutid a gang sipaw hakay malimad, atayza i bala', atay, punu'. mingaay tu alutit a pucu' hakay papulung tu hwasye a mingaay, padil a mingaay, tucek sapingaay a sapayu atu micici' yadah ku lamangan sapingaay. cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' a imelangay u izang hakay yadah ku tan-pay-c masaaam, pakutay tu izang a mingaay. u zumaay a alutid a pucu' hakay amiyung tu mahiniay u "hahalen miazih" a kawaw, nuzuma taneng a ngaayen. i Amilika, he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' lima a mihcaan 85% ku nikauzipay, cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' 69% dada' ku nikauzip. i 2012 a mihcaan, pakala tu 566,000 ku tademaw siimelangy tu alutid a pucu', 305000 ku mapatayay a tademaw,macalap tu 3 katukuh 4% ku hamin nu sigangay, hina maazihay ku sakapitu, i wawaan hinamazihay u sakatulu. palalecad i macakatat a Cong-kow a kanatal, alutid a pucu', hatu i macakatay a kanatal. cayay a he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' i Amilika lima a mihcaan 72 % pasintu ku mauzipay nu tademaw, he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' lima a mihcaan 87% pasintu ku mauzipay nu tademaw.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° *** ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° "kamu nu iŇč, r~…ĺjmpńßoma" ńßan, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a ar~…ĺutud gaŇč, ńßan, nu ar~…ĺutid sipaw masumad mar~…ĺaizaŇčaj a sipaw pu ¶u Ē~ °. ujni a ŇčaŇčan ugaŇč ńßan, ¶aaj ku ńßamin mańßiniaj a pu ¶u Ē~ °. ńßina maazińßaj nu saajawaj im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kaadada tabaki sa ku ar~…ĺutid, mańßamin ku uzip, tunaku sur~…ĺar~…ĺisan, sitanaŇč, mawada Ē~ ° ku bak…ôt nu uzup, "ujni tur~…ĺuaj kasańßini pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan paŇčaŇčan ńßan b sjmptoms", ńßinaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° anu ¶aaj ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt ku baŇč…ôs pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu kja tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, r~…ĺabii ku ka sitanaŇč. pasasizuma ** ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° u misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu iz…ôŇč nu ur~…ĺat sakaput a pu ¶u Ē~ °. dudu ¶ tu kasańßini nu sipaw, aŇčaŇčan tusa ku kasasizuma, ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s…ô ur~…ĺata pu ¶u Ē~ ° atu ¶aaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s…ô ur~…ĺat pu ¶u Ē~ °, zuma pasu i kitat ¶iki sakaput kasasizuma izaw ńß…ônaj ku du…ôs pu ¶u Ē~ ° atu ur~…ĺat mur~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s…ô ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° izaw ku mańßiniaj a sipa *…ô…ôd-st…ôrnb…ôrg, ¶aaj ka tar~…ĺakaw ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, wawa ńß…ôńß…ônaw siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu mańßiniaj ńßawsa kapańß Ňčaaj…ôn. ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s…ô ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° naji Ē~ ° ku mańßizaaj a sipaw, tar~…ĺakaw ku ka im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, **% ku ka ¶ar~…ĺap tu ńßamin nu ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ °, zuma pasu ¶a ¶anan a kasasizuma, bar~…ĺaki tu ku mińß ¶aan kja im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj tu kakapańß Ňčaaj…ôn. ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj makaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, makaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu nu babar~…ĺaki a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč masumad, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajduk, ju-m…ôn-r~…ĺow-sin-kan- ¶in a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ¶ir~…ĺkaj, ńßu-s…ô, ńßwa-sj…ô a sapaju atu pakajniaj nu uzipaj a sapit…ôna Ē~ ° a ¶umudan. ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku sipaw, pasu …ôb a bajduk atu zumaaj a bajduk. ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan a iŇč- ¶…ô pasu nu uzipaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u tad…ômaw ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku sapit…ôna Ē~ ° tu bajduk atu aj- ¶…ô-pin, tad…ômaw t a ar~…ĺutid sipaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajduk, sipaw muz…ôpit i satabu ńßajmaw sa mab…ôna Ē~ ° jadańß ku nikan tu titi atu simar~…ĺ, mi ¶ukajmas tu pisat…ôz…ôp, atu zuma sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. mar~…ĺibajaw ku ar~…ĺutud u siim…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °aj tu ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßinamaazińßaj ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu mur~…ĺar~…ĺad ku gaŇč a sipuw tajza i du…ôs maduka ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu izaŇč ńßawsa a ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku izaŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa atu ńßina mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajkiŇč. uzuma u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasu r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺisan, sitanaŇč tu r~…ĺabii, ma ¶ańß ¶ańß, makudus, ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt ku baŇč…ôs atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku uzip. ńßina makajzaaj i izaŇč, iisi, du…ôs mikinsa amiazińß u ar~…ĺutud a gaŇč, k…ôr~…ĺit ńßank u r~…ĺin-pa ńßakaj tan…ôŇč mipadaŇč tu piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. pigiŇčkiw nu isiŇč tu nisasiŇčan a tan…ôŇč ar~…ĺutid a gaŇč sipaw ńßakaj mar~…ĺimad, atajza i bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ataj, punu Ē~ °. miŇčaaj tu ar~…ĺutit a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj papur~…ĺuŇč tu ńßwasj…ô a miŇčaaj, padir~…ĺ a miŇčaaj, tu ¶…ôk sapiŇčaaj a sapaju atu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° jadańß ku r~…ĺamaŇčan sapiŇčaaj. ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u izaŇč ńßakaj jadańß ku tan-paj- ¶ masaaam, pakutaj tu izaŇč a miŇčaaj. u zumaaj a ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj amijuŇč tu mańßiniaj u "ńßańßar~…ĺ…ôn miazińß" a kawaw, nuzuma tan…ôŇč a Ňčaaj…ôn. i amir~…ĺika, ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan **% ku nikauzipaj, ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° **% dada Ē~ ° ku nikauzip. i **** a mińß ¶aan, pakar~…ĺa tu ***,*** ku tad…ômaw siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčj tu ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ °, ****** ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw,ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu * katukuńß *% ku ńßamin nu sigaŇčaj, ńßina maazińßaj ku sakapitu, i wawaan ńßinamazińßaj u sakatur~…ĺu. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i ma ¶akatat a ¶oŇč-kow a kanatar~…ĺ, ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ °, ńßatu i ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ajaj a ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° i amir~…ĺika r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ** % pasintu ku mauzipaj nu tad…ômaw, ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan **% pasintu ku mauzipaj nu tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == alutid a pucu' ś∑čŚ∑īÁė§ alutid a pucu' "kamu nu Ing, lymphoma" han, singangan aca alutud gang, han, nu alutid sipaw masumad malaizangay a sipaw pucu'. uyni a ngangan ugang han, caay ku hamin mahiniay a pucu'. hina maazihay nu saayaway imelang caay kaadada tabaki sa ku alutid, mahamin ku uzip, tunaku sulalisan, sitanang, mawada' ku baket nu uzup, "uyni tuluay kasahini pulung han pangangan han B symptoms", hinangelu' anucaay calenget ku banges pihaceng tu kya tahekal, labii ku ka sitanang. pasasizuma ŚąÜť°ě alutid a pucu' u misanga'ay tu izeng nu ulat sakaput a pucu'. duduc tu kasahini nu sipaw, angangan tusa ku kasasizuma, he-cye-cin-se ulata pucu' atu caay ku he-cye-cin-se ulat pucu', zuma pasu i kitat ciki sakaput kasasizuma izaw henay ku dues pucu' atu ulat mulaladay a imelang. . he-cye-cin-se alutid a pucu' izaw ku mahiniay a sipa Reed-Sternberg, caay ka talakaw ku mahiniay a imelang, wawa hehenaw siimelang tu mahiniay hawsa kapah ngaayen. cayay ku he-cye-cin-se alutid a pucu' nayi' ku mahizaay a sipaw, talakaw ku ka imelang, 90% ku kacalap tu hamin nu alutid a pucu', zuma pasu cacanan a kasasizuma, balaki tu ku mihcaan kya imelang, caay tu kakapah ngaayen. alutid a pucu' hakay makay nu luma'ay a imelang, makay mililiday tu nu babalaki a imelang masumad, malalid nu bayduk, yu-men-low-sin-kan-cin a malalid nu cilkay, hu-se, hwa-sye a sapayu atu pakayniay nu uzipay a sapitena' a cumudan. he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' katalawan malalid ku sipaw, pasu EB a bayduk atu zumaay a bayduk. cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' katalawan a ing-ce pasu nu uzipay a imelang, u tademaw caay kataneng ku sapitena' tu bayduk atu ay-ce-pin, tademaw T a alutid sipaw malalid nu bayduk, sipaw muzepit I satabu haymaw sa mabena' yadah ku nikan tu titi atu simal, micukaymas tu pisatezep, atu zuma sapipatay tu cilekay. malibayaw ku alutud u siimela'ay tu alutid a pucu' hinamaazihay ku mahiniay a imelang, anu mulalad ku gang a sipuw tayza i dues maduka ku sapisanga' tu izang hawsa a caay kataneng ku izang, malebawa atu hina malalid nu bayking. uzuma u imelang pasu lalid sa malalisan, sitanang tu labii, macahcah, makudus, calenget ku banges atu malalid mangelu' ku uzip. hina makayzaay i izang, iisi, dues mikinsa amiazih u alutud a gang, kelit hank u lin-pa hakay taneng mipadang tu piazih tu imelang. pigingkiw nu ising tu nisasingan a taneng alutid a gang sipaw hakay malimad, atayza i bala', atay, punu'. mingaay tu alutit a pucu' hakay papulung tu hwasye a mingaay, padil a mingaay, tucek sapingaay a sapayu atu micici' yadah ku lamangan sapingaay. cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' a imelangay u izang hakay yadah ku tan-pay-c masaaam, pakutay tu izang a mingaay. u zumaay a alutid a pucu' hakay amiyung tu mahiniay u "hahalen miazih" a kawaw, nuzuma taneng a ngaayen. i Amilika, he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' lima a mihcaan 85% ku nikauzipay, cayay ku he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' 69% dada' ku nikauzip. i 2012 a mihcaan, pakala tu 566,000 ku tademaw siimelangy tu alutid a pucu', 305000 ku mapatayay a tademaw,macalap tu 3 katukuh 4% ku hamin nu sigangay, hina maazihay ku sakapitu, i wawaan hinamazihay u sakatulu. palalecad i macakatat a Cong-kow a kanatal, alutid a pucu', hatu i macakatay a kanatal. cayay a he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' i Amilika lima a mihcaan 72 % pasintu ku mauzipay nu tademaw, he-cye-cin-s alutid a pucu' lima a mihcaan 87% pasintu ku mauzipay nu tademaw.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° *** ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° "kamu nu iŇč, r~…ĺjmpńßoma" ńßan, siŇčaŇčan a ¶a ar~…ĺutud gaŇč, ńßan, nu ar~…ĺutid sipaw masumad mar~…ĺaizaŇčaj a sipaw pu ¶u Ē~ °. ujni a ŇčaŇčan ugaŇč ńßan, ¶aaj ku ńßamin mańßiniaj a pu ¶u Ē~ °. ńßina maazińßaj nu saajawaj im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kaadada tabaki sa ku ar~…ĺutid, mańßamin ku uzip, tunaku sur~…ĺar~…ĺisan, kasasizuma, bar~…ĺaki tu ku mińß ¶aan kja im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj tu kakapańß Ňčaaj…ôn. ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj makaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, makaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu nu babar~…ĺaki a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč masumad, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajduk, ju-m…ôn-r~…ĺow-sin-kan- ¶in a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ¶ir~…ĺkaj, ńßu-s…ô, ńßwa-sj…ô a sapaju atu pakajniaj nu uzipaj a sapit…ôna Ē~ ° a ¶umudan. ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku sipaw, pasu …ôb a bajduk atu zumaaj a bajduk. ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan a iŇč- ¶…ô pasu nu uzipaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u tad…ômaw ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku sapit…ôna Ē~ ° tu bajduk atu aj- ¶…ô-pin, tad…ômaw t a ar~…ĺutid sipaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajduk, sipaw muz…ôpit i satabu ńßajmaw sa mab…ôna Ē~ ° jadańß ku nikan tu titi atu simar~…ĺ, mi ¶ukajmas tu pisat…ôz…ôp, atu zuma sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj. mar~…ĺibajaw ku ar~…ĺutud u siim…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °aj tu ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßinamaazińßaj ku mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu mur~…ĺar~…ĺad ku gaŇč a sipuw tajza i du…ôs maduka ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu izaŇč ńßawsa a ¶aaj katan…ôŇč ku izaŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôbawa atu ńßina mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bajkiŇč. uzuma u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasu r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺisan, sitanaŇč tu r~…ĺabii, ma ¶ańß ¶ańß, makudus, ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt ku baŇč…ôs atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku uzip. ńßina makajzaaj i izaŇč, iisi, du…ôs mikinsa amiazińß u ar~…ĺutud a gaŇč, k…ôr~…ĺit ńßank u r~…ĺin-pa ńßakaj tan…ôŇč mipadaŇč tu piazińß tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. pigiŇčkiw nu isiŇč tu nisasiŇčan a tan…ôŇč ar~…ĺutid a gaŇč sipaw ńßakaj mar~…ĺimad, atajza i bar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ataj, punu Ē~ °. miŇčaaj tu ar~…ĺutit a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj papur~…ĺuŇč tu ńßwasj…ô a miŇčaaj, padir~…ĺ a miŇčaaj, tu ¶…ôk sapiŇčaaj a sapaju atu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° jadańß ku r~…ĺamaŇčan sapiŇčaaj. ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj u izaŇč ńßakaj jadańß ku tan-paj- ¶ masaaam, pakutaj tu izaŇč a miŇčaaj. u zumaaj a ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßakaj amijuŇč tu mańßiniaj u "ńßańßar~…ĺ…ôn miazińß" a kawaw, nuzuma tan…ôŇč a Ňčaaj…ôn. i amir~…ĺika, ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan **% ku nikauzipaj, ¶ajaj ku ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° **% dada Ē~ ° ku nikauzip. i **** a mińß ¶aan, pakar~…ĺa tu ***,*** ku tad…ômaw siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčj tu ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ °, ****** ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw,ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu * katukuńß *% ku ńßamin nu sigaŇčaj, ńßina maazińßaj ku sakapitu, i wawaan ńßinamazińßaj u sakatur~…ĺu. par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i ma ¶akatat a ¶oŇč-kow a kanatar~…ĺ, ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ °, ńßatu i ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ajaj a ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° i amir~…ĺika r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ** % pasintu ku mauzipaj nu tad…ômaw, ńß…ô- ¶j…ô- ¶in-s ar~…ĺutid a pu ¶u Ē~ ° r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan **% pasintu ku mauzipaj nu tad…ômaw.
